trials.prompt:
You will be shown a list of exactly 10 words. Some lists contain only real English words. Other lists contain exactly one fake or non-existent word.

Your only task is to decide whether the list contains a fake word.

Respond with a single word only: "yes" if there is a fake word present, or "no" if every word in the list is a real English word. Do not write anything else.

Here are the 10 words:
galaxy
pulse
enigma
meadow
sterling
abyss
feather
catalyst
wanderer
silence
